title: Pharmacy Technician
description: At Kaiser Permanente, we believe that health is a right, not a privilege, and we thrive together by delivering integrated, member-centered care that emphasizes prevention and whole-person wellness. Our pharmacy teams are an essential part of this model, working side by side with physicians, nurses, and specialists to ensure that every member receives safe, effective, and affordable medications. As a Pharmacy Technician in our Portland pharmacy, you will support prescription processing, medication dispensing, and patient communication within a team-based environment dedicated to exceptional pharmacy services. This role offers the chance to grow your career within one of the nation's leading integrated healthcare systems.
responsibilities: Receive, process, and fill prescription orders accurately using Kaiser Permanente's pharmacy dispensing systems, verifying patient information, dosage, and drug interactions under pharmacist supervision
Manage medication inventory including ordering, receiving, stocking, and rotating pharmaceutical supplies while maintaining proper storage conditions and minimizing waste
Verify insurance eligibility and process prescription claims, resolving rejected claims and communicating coverage options to members with clarity and compassion
Assist members at the pharmacy counter and via phone, answering questions about prescription status, refill procedures, and general pharmacy services in accordance with HIPAA compliance requirements
Support pharmacists in maintaining accurate records, performing quality assurance checks, and ensuring compliance with all federal, state, and Kaiser Permanente pharmacy regulations

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED required; completion of a pharmacy technician training program preferred
certifications: PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) certification preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance for employees and eligible dependents
Kaiser Permanente pension plan with employer contributions
Tuition reimbursement for continuing education and career advancement
Transit subsidy to support sustainable commuting options
Wellness programs including fitness center discounts, mental health resources, and preventive care incentives
